subject: fix(layout): wire Structure tab into global cell selection for alignment
body:
The Structure tab had its own internal cell selection (structureSelection state)
completely disconnected from the global selectedCell used by every other tab via
the ContextBar. This meant users had to re-select cells in the Structure grid
before alignment controls would work — confusing and inconsistent.

Changes:
- Pass selectedCell + onSelectCell props to LayoutTab (matching Media/Content/Style)
- Text Alignment section now reads/writes using global selectedCell directly
- Added inline cell selector buttons in alignment section for quick switching
- Structure grid cell clicks now sync to global selection via onSelectCell
- structureSelection kept for structural editing only (section sizes, subdivisions)

Tags: ux, layout, alignment, state
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: structure-tab-ux
Semver: patch
